1_digital_transformation.name: Digital Transformation
1_digital_transformation.description: The shift from analog to digital technology across society and business.

2000.description: Early web technologies begin to transform business and communication.

2010.description: Mobile revolution changes how people access digital services.

2020.description: AI and automation begin to transform all industries.

2_climate_awareness.name: Climate Awareness
2_climate_awareness.description: Growing recognition of climate change as a global crisis requiring action.

2000.description: Early mainstream awareness of climate change issues.

2010.description: Climate activism grows among younger generations.

2020.description: Climate action becomes mainstream policy priority globally.
